metadata.title: About - Gaston Allende
metadata.description: Learn more about Gaston Allende, frontend expert with 12+ years in Angular and TypeScript, now expanding into fullstack with C# and .NET.

hero.title: About Me
hero.subtitle: Frontend expert with 12+ years in Angular and TypeScript — now building fullstack solutions with C# and .NET

bio.title: Building for the Long Term
paragraphs: With 12+ years in the JavaScript ecosystem — specialized in Angular and TypeScript — I build well-structured, scalable applications that hold up in production. I've led frontend teams, driven architecture and technology decisions, and collaborated closely with UX designers and backend developers across complex enterprise environments.

I have a keen eye for detail and build user-friendly interfaces with clean, maintainable code — something I see as the key to sustainable, long-term projects. I stay sharp through FrontendMasters and DataCamp alongside hands-on exploration of new tools and techniques.

I work in the financial sector as a fullstack developer, building production systems with Angular and TypeScript on the frontend and C# with .NET on the backend. I've also been expanding into AI — applying prompt engineering and generative AI to improve developer workflows and build smarter tools.

skills.title: Skills & Expertise
skills.subtitle: Tools and technologies I work with

items.title: Frontend Developer / Fullstack Developer
items.description: Developing web-based solutions focused on user experience, performance, and scalability. Building component-based interfaces with Angular and TypeScript in close collaboration with UX designers and backend developers. Driving code review processes, CI/CD, and performance measurement while contributing to architecture and technology decisions for long-term code quality. Recently expanded responsibilities to include fullstack development.

items.title: Frontend Developer (Consultant via FreeCode AB)
items.description: Refactored the codebase to achieve better architecture, scalability, maintainability, and performance. As a more senior developer, played a key role in mentoring junior developers, guiding them in best practices and helping them solve technical challenges.

items.title: Frontend Developer (Consultant via FreeCode AB)
items.description: Collaborated with scrum masters, testers, product owners, and backend developers across five teams, two located abroad. During the last 1.5 years, took on the role of frontend lead, managing a team of three frontend developers building a web application to control and configure water pump stations in Sweden and other countries. Worked closely with a UX designer to establish design rules and patterns. As the project's first frontend developer, contributed to key architectural and design decisions.

items.title: System Developer
items.description: Started as a trainee, gaining a solid foundation in IBM's technology stack. Worked with DB2, CL scripting, and RPG/LE to develop and maintain high-quality software solutions in production environments.

items.title: Frontend Developer
items.description: Developed websites, campaign pages, and integrations for various clients using JavaScript, CSS/SASS, and modern frameworks like Angular and Vue.js. Worked closely with clients to ensure deliverables met both technical and business requirements.

items.title: Web Developer (Internship, Summer Job & Freelance)
items.description: Built technical foundation through internships and freelance projects. At Situs Media AB, developed modules and custom CMS solutions in Snowfire — offered continued employment after the internship. At Klirr reklambyrå AB (Nozy), worked on an event system and the 'Challenge Ebola' campaign page supporting Doctors Without Borders and the Red Cross. As a freelancer, independently handled design and development of complete web projects using Laravel and Vue.js.

items.degree: Prompt Engineering and Generative AI for Developers

metadata.title: Projects - Gaston Allende
metadata.description: Explore the projects built by Gaston Allende — from web apps to design systems.

header.title: Featured Projects
header.subtitle: A collection of my recent work spanning web development, mobile apps, and innovative digital solutions

items.title: Banking Customer Portal
items.description: Enterprise banking web portal built with Angular and C# .NET
items.fullDescription: Developed a secure, scalable banking customer portal handling account management, transaction history, and internal tooling. Built with Angular and TypeScript on the frontend, backed by a C# .NET REST API and SQL Server. Integrated with Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines and deployed on Azure.

items.title: Enterprise Angular Design System
items.description: Scalable Angular component library and design system for enterprise teams
items.fullDescription: Architected and built a reusable Angular component library with 80+ components, full TypeScript typings, and RxJS/NGRX-based state management patterns. Documented with Storybook and adopted across multiple product teams, significantly reducing UI development time and enforcing consistent UX standards.

items.title: Water Infrastructure Dashboard
items.description: Real-time web app for monitoring and configuring water pump stations
items.fullDescription: Led frontend development of a complex web application used to remotely control and configure water pump stations across Sweden and Europe. Built with Angular and TypeScript, using WebSockets for real-time telemetry data. Led a team of three frontend developers, defined component architecture, and collaborated closely with UX designers and distributed backend teams.

items.title: REST API Platform
items.description: Scalable C# .NET REST API, containerized with Docker and deployed on Azure
items.fullDescription: Designed and implemented a layered RESTful API in C# and .NET following clean architecture principles. Includes JWT authentication, SQL Server integration via Entity Framework, Docker containerization, and Azure deployment. Features comprehensive Swagger documentation, structured logging, and global error handling.

items.title: Real-time Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Data analytics dashboard with live updates via SignalR and WebSockets
items.fullDescription: Built a fullstack analytics dashboard with an Angular frontend consuming real-time data pushed via SignalR from a C# .NET backend. Features configurable data views, historical trend charts, and role-based access control. SQL Server for persistence, Docker for containerization, and Azure for deployment.

items.title: AI Integration Service
items.description: C# .NET service integrating OpenAI APIs for intelligent document processing
items.fullDescription: Built a backend service in C# .NET that connects enterprise workflows with OpenAI's API for intelligent document processing, text summarization, and prompt-driven automation. Applied prompt engineering techniques and integrated with existing .NET services via REST. Combines fullstack backend experience with applied generative AI.
